title: 深度学习正在改变量化研究范式：从特征工程到端到端表征学习
text: 讨论 Transformer、深度时间序列模型和表征学习如何减少传统因子工程依赖，并在订单簿预测、组合构建和风险建模中形成新的研究范式。

title: Deep learning for limit order book prediction is becoming a production research lane
text: A thread arguing that transformer-based limit order book models, representation learning, and deep reinforcement learning for execution are moving from papers into production quant research.
